title: Detecting AI-assisted writing in ChemRxiv: pre-registrations, deviations, and protocols
description: Pre-registrations, deviations, and frozen protocols for a study of AI-assisted writing in ChemRxiv preprints. Includes the EditLens-Chem protocol: a chemistry- and current-generation-adapted AI-edit detector, with its analysis code frozen before model training and before any held-out evaluation.
